title: Those Were The Good Days! (TWTGD)
description: The Best Performance-Friendly Resource Pack To Bring Back Minecraft's Old Textures!
body:
Those Were The Good Days (Or TWTGD) is a resource pack that brings back Minecraft's old textures to more modern versions of the game!\
If you missed the old textures, and like the new versions, this texture pack is for you!\
Zombified piglins (Formerly zombie pigmen) have their old textures back, too (kind of)!\
TWTGD is also performance friendly, so you can play it with barely any lag.

![The Nether Wastes From Old Minecraft](https://i.postimg.cc/N0ZgHdbs/2024-06-27-08-22-48.png)

This even changes panarormas and titles to the old 1.10 ones, too!

This pack took a while to make, so please enjoy!\
Please report any issues to me!\
Best of all, TWTGD doesn't require anything special, such as Optifine!

Note: TWTGD is still in beta, I cannot guarantee everything will work as intended, but it should.
